vehicle.label: Tiltrotor VTOL Hybrid
vehicle.desc: Fixed-wing VTOL with 2 tilting rotor nacelles, BVLOS long-range capable

parts.label: Center Fuselage Spine
parts.spec: CFRP box beam center fuselage, avionics bay, wing spar socket, front GPS boom mount, belly camera window

parts.label: Main Wing (2-piece)
parts.spec: Straight wing, 4S NACA 2412, dual 15mm CFRP spar, 900mm half-span, 160mm chord, 3-layer CFRP skin

parts.label: Nacelle Assembly x 2
parts.spec: Tilting nacelle assembly, 0-90deg tilt axis, 6309 bearing set, servo-driven worm gear, motor and ESC pocket

parts.label: Tilt Servo + Linkage x 2
parts.spec: 25kg-cm DS3218 servo per nacelle, titanium pushrod, dual ball joints, tilt range 0-93deg, crash-tolerant

parts.label: V-Tail x 2 (Ruddervator)
parts.spec: +-35deg V-tail ruddervator pair, MG996R servo each, 30deg dihedral, CFRP sandwich panel, hinge piano wire

parts.label: Landing Gear (Tri)
parts.spec: Tricycle landing gear, spring-steel skid arms, 55mm dia wheels, CG at 1/3 chord, 200mm wheelbase

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide-In)
parts.spec: Belly slide-in battery bay, 6S 8000mAh Li-ion pack, Velcro + strap dual retention, CG position 28% MAC

parts.label: Payload Nose Bay
parts.spec: Interchangeable nose payload bay, Day/IR camera gimbal or survey sensor, 80x60x50mm, 300g payload limit

parts.label: Tilt-Axis Harness + Datum Service Bay
parts.spec: Tiltrotor integration_service module with tilt-axis harness_channel, slack_loop, interface_datum, service_hatch, connector keying, and nacelle-to-wing load-path inspection access

requirements: Tilting nacelle assembly, 0-90deg tilt axis, 6309 bearing set, servo-driven worm gear, motor and ESC pocket

risk.desc: Potential thermal stress on avionics bay due to high heat generation.
risk.mit: Implement active cooling system or use thermally conductive materials.

risk.desc: Camera window may be prone to damage during operation.
risk.mit: Add protective cover or reinforce window frame.

risk.desc: Service access port may be difficult to reach during maintenance.
risk.mit: Optimize location for easier access.

risk.desc: GPS boom mount may experience excessive vibration.
risk.mit: Use vibration dampening materials or redesign mount.

risk.desc: Wing spar socket may not provide sufficient load transfer.
risk.mit: Review load calculations and adjust socket dimensions.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: CFRP box beam center fuselage, avionics bay, wing spar socket, front GPS boom mount, belly camera window

physics_paths.path_description: Loads from wing spars are transferred into the fuselage spine.
Heat generated by avionics is dissipated through the fuselage shell.
Motion of the ruddervator affects the stability of the V-tail.

risk.desc: Potential thermal expansion issues due to sun exposure on spar socket
risk.mit: Implement thermal management solutions like heat sinks or insulation

risk.desc: Risk of insufficient clearance in snap-fit interfaces leading to jamming
risk.mit: Review and adjust clearance values for snap-fit interfaces

risk.desc: Band clamp may not provide sufficient clamping force for landing gear mount
risk.mit: Consider alternative clamping methods or reinforce the band clamp

risk.desc: Potential misalignment during assembly due to bolted connections
risk.mit: Use alignment pins or guide pins to ensure proper alignment

risk.desc: Risk of electrical signal interference in harness passthrough
risk.mit: Use shielded cables and ensure proper routing to minimize interference

Electrical signals from harness passthrough to servo module

integration_opportunities.description: Optimize spar_socket for better load distribution
Improve aerodynamics around v_tail and ruddervator

risk.desc: Potential misalignment due to tolerance stack-up in FDM manufacturing.
risk.mit: Implement tighter tolerance controls and conduct post-manufacturing alignment checks.

risk.desc: Risk of insufficient clearance for motor/servo replacement if access_cover is not designed properly.
risk.mit: Review and adjust access_cover dimensions to ensure adequate clearance for maintenance.

risk.desc: Risk of overloading bearing seats if load distribution is not optimized.
risk.mit: Conduct finite element analysis to optimize load distribution and reinforce bearing seats if necessary.

risk.desc: Risk of interference between tilt_axis and surrounding components if clearance is not maintained.
risk.mit: Ensure clearance around tilt_axis is maintained during design and manufacturing.

risk.desc: Risk of improper assembly due to unclear assembly_order_hint in interfaces.
risk.mit: Clarify assembly_order_hint in interface definitions and provide detailed assembly instructions.
